reviews.review_title: Cool mix of farming and parkour
reviews.review_description: Tried this yesterday and it's a solid little game. I like that you can either just chill in the garden if you want to relax, or do some parkour if you're into more active movement. Usually these games feel a bit slow, but the mechanics here are pretty snappy. Graphics are clean and everything runs smooth on the Quest. Definitely not boring.

I didn't think the parkour in this game would be so addictive. You'll hate the developers, but you'll come back again and again for that thrill of passing every checkpoint! And of course, the garden is incredible; the plants are amazing! Kudos to the developers, I'm looking forward to the full release and more cool features in the game!

This game is very high in quality and is filled to the brim with features the game needs more players tho you can just play with friends for now till the player count gets higher, absolutely 5 stars I’ll play with friends for now.

I thought this game whould be fun but you cant even join privats if you try to you will only be put into a public and not that many people play the game just dont have a PC for codes and dont have multiplayer if you add multiplayer do it right if you add multiplayer you need privates
Cool challenges experience with really funny and beautiful farm

reviews.review_title: Farm farm farm farm farm FARM FARM FARM
reviews.review_description: A good game for the sake of the farm, good parkour for the sake of the farm, everything is good for the sake of the farm, farm, farm, farm, farm
Peak so Mitch plants and rly fun five stars if you don’t download this I will scream at you
